text: Operations lead reports that the weekly headcount dashboard does not match the source export and needs a correction path before review.
Pilot coordinator cannot login to the admin workspace and the rollout team is blocked from updating store settings.
Webhook sync from the handheld app to the planning dashboard fails when a new store task is created.
The rollout guide is unclear and maybe missing the step for mapping source fields into the reporting template.
Team lead asks for an export filter that groups open rollout issues by store cluster, owner, and due date.
Analyst reports that the dashboard is slow during weekly reporting and sometimes reaches a timeout.
The report works now and the operations note was helpful for the internal rollout team.
Stakeholder left a vague note about confusing work and did not explain which area or step is affected.
Analyst sees an error when saving a custom operations dashboard and the change fails after reload.
Process owner asks whether the docs include an example for source-to-report mapping and validation checks.
